Use: Increases your Critical Strike by 165 for 1 hour.

Lasts 1 hour and through death. Consuming an identical flask will add another 1 hour. (3 Sec Cooldown)

The cauldron lasts for 5 min and has 40 charges.

demon-hunter-havoc.summary: Maintain Immolation Aura on CD, route Fury into Eye Beam windows, dump with Annihilation in AoE and Blade Dance in Cleave.
priority: Keep Immolation Aura active in combat
Eye Beam off cooldown inside The Hunt windows
Annihilation as primary Fury dump; Blade Dance at 2+ targets
Chaos Strike to avoid Fury capping

demon-hunter-vengeance.summary: Maintain Demon Spikes on CD, route Soul Fragments into Soul Carver windows, use Fiery Brand as a major defensive.
priority: Soul Cleave to consume excess Soul Fragments
Metamorphosis as a major defensive on heavy damage
Sigil of Spite on cooldown for AoE threat

demon-hunter-devourer.summary: Build Soul Fragments, ascend into Void Metamorphosis, fire Collapsing Stars as apex spells; weave Voidblade for melee combo sequences.
priority: Voidblade on cooldown to generate Fury and start melee combos
Collapsing Star during Void Metamorphosis windows
Hungering Slash to maintain the Void Metamorphosis buff
